![](../../../images/img_7.png) The buttons **Pages**. Shows the list of pages of the report template. See the point ![](../../../images/img_2.png).

![](../../../images/img_8.png) The button **Plus**. The button  is used to add pages to the report template. The page will be added to the end of the list. By default, the name of the page is automatically generated.


* **Notice**: The command **Delete** page and its duplication are located in the context menu of this page.

---

# Page Setup

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Report_Designer/Tabs/Tab_Page/Page_Setup.md

This group contains elements to control basic parameters of a page. These are page margins, orientation, page size, columns.


![](../../../images/topics/Report_Designer.Tabs.Tab_Page.Page_Setup_1.png)


![](../../../images/img_1.png) The tab **Paper** contains settings such as:

* **Paper Size**. Sets width, height, and supports the ability to select the standard paper size. Width, height are displayed in units of the report.

* **Page Orientation**. Supports two options - portrait and landscape.

* **Page Margins**. Sets left, right, top, and bottom margins. Values ​​are specified in units of the report.


![](../../../images/topics/Report_Designer.Tabs.Tab_Page.Page_Setup_2.png)


![](../../../images/img_2.png) The tab **Columns** contains page column settings:

* Specifies the number of columns from 0 to 100.

* Specifies the width of columns if the automatically generated size is not good.

* You can also specify the spacing between columns.

* The mode of column positions. By default, the columns are output from left to right. You can change the output order to the from right to left by checking the parameter **Right to Left**.


![](../../../images/topics/Report_Designer.Tabs.Tab_Page.Page_Setup_3.png)


![](../../../images/img_3.png) The tab **Watermark** contains settings to output a watermark on the page of the report template:

* The first group of parameters provides the ability to set the text and change its properties (color, angle, font, etc.).

* You can set an image as the watermark. You can setup the scale, transparency, image cropping etc.

* On the preview panel on the top left side of the dialog form Watermark panel you can see as thumbnail of the report template page and a watermark added. Changes are immediately shown there.


* **Notice**: When you add an image to the watermark, the value of parameter **Image Transparency** is set to **0**. So you should set the necessary transparency manually.

---

# Обновление_2

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_System/Update_2.md

Компания **Stimulsoft** поcтоянно ведет разработку программного обеcпечения **Reports Server**. Для того чтобы уcтановить поcледнюю верcию этого ПО, необходимо быть зарегиcтрированным пользователем, иметь доcтуп в интернет и нажать кнопку **Обновить (Update)** на вкладке **cиcтема (System)**:


![](../images/topics/Tab_System.Update_2_1.png)


Как видно из риcунка, окно обновления предcтавлено cледующими полями:

![](../images/img_1.png) Поле **Текущая верcия (Current Software)**. Данное поле cодержит информацию о верcии **Stimulsoft Reports Server** и дату поcледнего обновления.

![](../images/img_2.png) При наличии новой верcии, будет доcтупно данное поле. Здеcь cодержитcя информация о поcледних изменениях в программном обеcпечении **Stimulsoft Reports Server**, а также дата поcледнего релиза.


При наличии новой верcии, для продолжения обновления ПО, cледует в данном окне нажать кнопку **Обновление (Update)**. Поcле этого, пользователю будет отображено окно **Лицензия (License)**:


![](../images/topics/Tab_System.Update_2_2.png)


* **ОБРАТИТЕ ВНИМАНИЕ:** ПОЖАЛУЙcТА, ВНИМАТЕЛЬНО ПРОЧИТАЙТЕ ТЕКcТ ЛИЦЕНЗИОННОГО cОГЛАШЕНИЯ.


Для продолжения обновления ПО необходимо принять лицензионное cоглашение. В противном cлучае, обновление будет прервано. Поcле нажатия кнопки **Я cоглаcен (I Agree)**, обновления ПО **Stimulsoft Reports Server** будут уcтановлены автоматичеcки.

---

# Резервное копирование

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_System/Backup_and_Restore.md

## Резервное копирование

---

# SMTP Server Settings

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Administration/Tab_System/SMTP_Server_Settings.md

For sending emails you need to use a SMTP server. In order to bring up the SMTP server settings, press the Settings button of the **SMTP server (SMTP Server Settings)** the **System** tab.


![](../../images/topics/Administration.Tab_System.SMTP_Server_Settings_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) The field **SMTP Host**. Here you specify the address of the SMTP server.

![](../../images/img_2.png) The field **SMTP Port**. Here you specify the port of connection to the server.

![](../../images/img_3.png) The field **User**. The username (login) to connect to the SMTP server is specified in this field.

![](../../images/img_4.png) The field **Password**. In this field the password is specified to authentication on the SMTP server.

![](../../images/img_5.png) The field **Sender Email**. Specifies the e-mail address that will appear to the recipient as a sender email.

![](../../images/img_6.png) **Use SSL**. This option provides the ability to apply a cryptographic cipher to e-mails. If this box is checked, the cipher is applied.

---

# Tab Home

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_Home/index.md

Toolbar contains the basic commands of the report server and its elements. At the same time, depending on the selected element, the list of commands may be different. For example, if you select the Excel item, then the Import Data command will be available. The picture below shows the Home tab, with the commands for the **Report** item.


![](../images/topics/Tab_Home_1.png)


![](../images/img_1.png) The **Create** menu contains a list of items that can be added to the report server tree.

![](../images/img_2.png) The **Edit** button is used to edit the selected item.

![](../images/img_3.png) The **Delete** button is used to delete the selected item. The user will see the dialog box that is shown on the picture below.


![](../images/topics/Tab_Home_2.png)


In this window, you need to define the Move to Recycle Bin parameter, and confirm (or undo) this operation. If this option is checked, the deleted item will be moved to the trash and can be restored. If unchecked, the item will be removed forever.


![](../images/img_4.png) The **Sort** button. The following sorting options are available:

  * By name;

  * By type;

  * By the date of creation;

  * By the date of changes.


![](../images/img_5.png) The button is used to display or hide the recycle bin.

![](../images/img_6.png) The **Run** button. When you select this command the report is rendered and loaded into the viewer.

![](../images/img_7.png) The **Run without Preview** command. With this command, you can export the report without loading it in the report viewer.


![](../images/topics/Tab_Home_3.png)


1. Specify the destination for the result;
2. The type of the file, into which will be transformed a report;
3. Determine the template of the result name;
4. Specify the report parameters. If the report has no parameters, you will need to perform only the previous three steps.


![](../images/img_8.png) The **Design Report** button calls the report designer and loads a selected item (the report) into it.

![](../images/img_9.png) The **Administration** button calls the appropriate window.

![](../images/img_10.png) The list of **notifications** that display the progress of implementation server commands.

---

# Tab Tools

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_Tools/index.md

On this tab you can find the following elements.


![](../images/topics/Tab_Tools_1.png)


![](../images/img_1.png) The **Share** command is used to call the sharing menu;

![](../images/img_2.png) The **Download** button saves the item as a file of a certain type. After selecting this command the dialog box will appear. In the dialog you should determine a saving location and click Save. You should know that not every item has this command.

![](../images/img_3.png) The **Versions** button calls the appropriate menu.

![](../images/img_4.png) The **Using** button calls the appropriate menu.

![](../images/img_5.png) The **Log** button calls the appropriate menu.

![](../images/img_6.png) When creating an item the unique key of the item is automatically generated. In order to obtain this key, select the command. The unique key of the item is needed for future access to this item, when using API of the report server in third-party applications. After selecting this command, the key will be displayed on the Access Key panel.

---

# Excel Files

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Menu_Create/Data_Source/Import_Data_from_Files/Excel.md

Consider obtaining data from the Excel file. First you need to load the Excel file into the item tree:

* The Excel file can be simply dragged & dropped) from any place into the item tree;

* Create the File item and load the Excel file into it.


![](../../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Data_Source.Import_Data_from_Files.Excel_1.png)


You should now select the Excel file and select Import Data to display the Import Data Wizard. Extracting data from the Excel file will take a few simple steps plus defining parameters:


* Step One - **Sheets**. This step is necessary to select an Excel sheet, from which data will be imported. In the example below, the first sheet of the Excel file is selected.


![](../../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Data_Source.Import_Data_from_Files.Excel_2.png)


![](../../../images/img_1.png) This field contains a brief description of the actions at this stage.

![](../../../images/img_2.png) The field contains a list of pages of the Excel file.


* Step Two - **Data**. In this step represents Excel file columns that contain data. If you just click Next, all data will be imported. Also, it is possible to allocate certain data, and then import them. Selection is carried out using the Ctrl and Shift buttons. The Ctrl key is held in the allocation of contiguous entries. Held down the Shift button to select contiguous entries:


![](../../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Data_Source.Import_Data_from_Files.Excel_3.png)


![](../../../images/img_1.png) This field contains a brief description of the actions at this stage.

![](../../../images/img_2.png) The data columns and headers.


* Step Three - **Headers**. In this step, headers for data columns are defined. To do this, select the row (or rows) with data to determine the parameters and headers will be created automatically. Selecting multiple lines can be done using the Ctrl button (for non-contiguous selection) or Shift (for contiguous selection). If at this stage, no one line will be selected the headers remain unchanged.


![](../../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Data_Source.Import_Data_from_Files.Excel_4.png)


![](../../../images/img_1.png) This field contains a brief description of the actions at this stage.

![](../../../images/img_2.png) The **Remove Empty Columns** option. If checked, all empty columns will be removed. If unchecked, then empty columns will be present in the data table.

![](../../../images/img_3.png) The **Remove Empty Rows** option. If checked, all empty rows will be removed. If unchecked, then empty rows are present in the data table.

![](../../../images/img_4.png) The **Reset Selection** option. If checked, the selection will be reset.

![](../../../images/img_5.png) The data columns and headers.


> **Notice**
>
> * **Notice:** Punctuation marks and special characters cannot be used in the column header. This is the limitation in the C# language. Therefore, at the presence of illegal characters, the header will remain unchanged.


* Last step - **Preview**. This step provides an opportunity to preview the future data table into its final form. If necessary, you can go back to previous steps and change settings. To complete importing data, you must click Finish:


![](../../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Data_Source.Import_Data_from_Files.Excel_5.png)


![](../../../images/img_1.png) This field contains a brief description of the actions at this stage.

![](../../../images/img_2.png) Created data columns and headers.


Now, based on these tables, you can build reports.

---

# Blank Report

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_Create/Report/Blank_Report.md

In order to create a report without structure, but which may contain data or files, use the command Blank Report.


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Report.Blank_Report_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) The report item name is specified in this field.

![](../../images/img_2.png) Description, notes that should be added to the report can be written in this field.

![](../../images/img_3.png) You can attach additional items:

* If the Data Source is attached, its contents (data tables, results of execution of queries and stored procedures, views, etc.) can be used when creating reports.

* The attached item in the Report Template will be attached with respect to create reports.

* The attached Image will be a permanent resource for the report template. In other words, you can use the attached image in the report without having to load from external sources.

* The attached Text File can be a source of the text when working with text components of the report, including RichText components.

![](../../images/img_3.png) Pressing this button you will go back to the menu **New report template**.

![](../../images/img_4.png) Clicking this button the new report template will be created.

![](../../images/img_5.png) Cancels the report template creation.

---

# Report from File

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_Create/Report/Report_from_File.md

Another way to add a list of items in the report server is to load a report from the file. The file may be located either in the item list or any other place. Below is the menu to load a report from the file:


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Report.Report_from_File_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) This field specifies the report template file as a list of items of the report server, or from the local file system. You can also add multiple files. In this case each added file of a report template will be created as a separate item. The names of items will be generated automatically. Adding files to this panel can be done by dragging, and using the controls.

![](../../images/img_2.png) In this field you can attach a data source to the report. Images, text files, including Rich-text, reports can also be attached to the template. If reports will be placed in this field, then they will be sub-reports in relation to the created reports.


* **Information**: If several files of report templates are specified (several items **Report** are be created), and additional items are specified too, then they (i.e. additional items) will be attached to all items **Report**.


![](../../images/img_3.png) Pressing this button you will go back to the menu **New report template**.

![](../../images/img_4.png) Clicking this button the new report template will be created.

![](../../images/img_5.png) Cancels the report template creation.

---

# Standard Report

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Menu_Create/Report/Standard_Wizard.md

When you create a report using the **Standard Report** wizard, the report will contain one **Data Band** or one **Data Table**. Creating a report using the wizard includes 11 steps. Not all of them are mandatory.


![](../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Report.Standard_Wizard_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) Attach other items to the report. For example, images, files, data sources, etc. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_2.png) Select the data source on which a report will be created. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_3.png) Select data columns to be output in a report. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_4.png) Specify the order of placing the columns on the **Data Band**. The order of the columns from top to bottom corresponds to the order of the columns in the report from left to right. Changing the order in the report wizard is possible with the help of two buttons on the control panel of this step.


![](../../images/img_5.png) Sort data if needed.

![](../../images/img_6.png) Sometimes you need to show not the whole list of data but a specific range of data. For example, display the products cost from 40 to 200 dollars. In this case, the report is used to filter the data. Conditions of filtering are determined at this stage.

![](../../images/img_7.png) The report, which has too large volume of data, can be easier to perceive, if to make grouping of data. For example, if the report contains a list of products, they can be grouped by the first letter of the product name. Parameters are determined by grouping in this step.

![](../../images/img_8.png) Here you can define a function to calculate the totals for any of the columns of the selected data source.


![](../../images/img_9.png) In this step, you can choose the style of the report and apply it to it.

![](../../images/img_10.png) Define the basic parameters of the report such as page orientation, scripting language component that will be used for the report (**Data Band** or **Data Table**), the report units.

![](../../images/img_11.png) Give the name to the report item and write description for the report, if necessary. This is a mandatory step.

---

# Master-Detail Report

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Menu_Create/Report/Master_Detail_Wizard.md

Creating a master-detail report using the wizard includes 12 steps. Not all of them are mandatory.


![](../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Report.Master_Detail_Wizard_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) Attach other items to the report. For example, images, files, data sources, etc. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_2.png) Select the data source on which a report will be created. This is a mandatory step.


> **Notice**
>
> * **Notice:** You should understand that the Master-Detail Report at least two sources, one of which is the master, and the second is detail. At the same time, the relation between these sources should be organized.


![](../../images/img_3.png) Select data columns to be output in a report. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_4.png) Specify the order of placing the columns on the Data Band. The order of the columns from top to bottom corresponds to the order of the columns in the report from left to right. Changing the order in the report wizard is possible with the help of two buttons on the control panel of this step.


![](../../images/img_5.png) Sort data if needed. Sorting can be set separately as a Master and Detail.

![](../../images/img_6.png) Sometimes you need to show not the whole list of data but a specific range of data. For example, display the products cost from 40 to 200 dollars. In this case, the report is used to filter the data. Conditions of filtering are determined at this stage. Filtering can be set separately as a Master and Detail.


> **Notice**
>
> * **Notice:** If the Master entry will not fit in the filter conditions, i.e. data is output for printing, in this case, all its subordinate entries will not be printed.


![](../../images/img_7.png) The report, which has too large volume of data, can be easier to perceive, if to make grouping of data. For example, if the report contains a list of products, they can be grouped by the first letter of the product name. Parameters are determined by grouping in this step.

![](../../images/img_8.png) On this step, select the relation between data sources.


![](../../images/img_9.png) Here you can define a function to calculate the totals for any of the columns of the selected data source.

![](../../images/img_10.png) In this step, you can choose the style of the report and apply it to it.

![](../../images/img_11.png) Define the basic parameters of the report such as page orientation, scripting language component that will be used for the report (Data Band or Data Table), the report units.

![](../../images/img_12.png) Give the name to the report item and write description for the report, if necessary. This is a mandatory step.

---

# Report with Chart

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Menu_Create/Report/Chart_Wizard.md

Creating a report with chart using the wizard includes 8 steps. Not all of them are mandatory.


![](../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Report.Chart_Wizard_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) Attach other items to the report. For example, images, files, data sources, etc. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_2.png) Select the chart type.

![](../../images/img_3.png) Select the chart style.

![](../../images/img_4.png) Add the chart series. The chart should be at least one series.

![](../../images/img_5.png) Define a number of labels by selecting them and changing the type of parameters.

![](../../images/img_6.png) Determine the parameters of the axes in the chart.

![](../../images/img_7.png) Set the legend and change its parameters implemented at this stage.

![](../../images/img_8.png) Give the name to the report item and write description for the report, if necessary. This is a mandatory step.

---

# Report with Label

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Menu_Create/Report/Label_Report_Wizard.md

Creating a report with label using the wizard includes 12 steps. Not all of them are mandatory.


![](../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Report.Label_Report_Wizard_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) Attach other items to the report. For example, images, files, data sources, etc. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_2.png) Select the data source on which a report will be created. This is a mandatory step.

![](../../images/img_3.png) This step defines the label settings.

![](../../images/img_4.png) Give the name to the report item and write description for the report, if necessary. This is a mandatory step.


![](../../images/topics/Menu_Create.Report.Label_Report_Wizard_2.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) **Type Panel**. Set the report units and Label Type.

![](../../images/img_2.png) **Panel size label**. Change the size of the label.

![](../../images/img_3.png) **Panel size pages**. Select the page size or manually set the value of the width and height of the page, as well as its borders.

![](../../images/img_4.png) **Panel configuration label**. Customize the label, specify the number of rows and columns, and select the direction of placing labels on the page.

![](../../images/img_5.png) **Preview Panel**. Preview the labels on the page, certain parameters.

---

# Cloud Storage

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_Create/Cloud_Storage/index.md

The report server has the ability to import files from an online (cloud) storage. In addition, the cloud storage can be a destination for the result of actions of the scheduler. Access to the online store can be organized using the item **Cloud Storage**. Depending on the type of the online storage it is necessary to determine the item type of the **Cloud Storage**.


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Cloud_Storage_1.png)


After selecting the type, click the tab **Settings** to define the settings for the online storage.

---

# Settings

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Tab_Create/Cloud_Storage/Settings.md

This tab defines the parameters of the Cloud Storage items, and configure access to the online storage of a definite type. Consider the parameters that do not depend on the type and are always present when creating a new item.


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Cloud_Storage.Settings_1.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) In the field **Name** you can put the name of a cloud storage which will be shown in the item tree.

![](../../images/img_2.png) Enter some short information of the cloud storage in this field.

![](../../images/img_3.png) With this option, you can change the type of the cloud storage without having to go back to the previous tab **Type**.


Now consider the parameters for each type of a cloud storage.


* Storage **Dropbox** and **MS OneDrive**


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Cloud_Storage.Settings_2.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) When you click this button the report server checks the connection to the Internet and an authorization **Dropbox** or **MS OneDrive** window will be called. In the opened window, you must specify your login (email) and password.

![](../../images/img_2.png) The button **Test Connection**. When pressed, the report server checks the internet connection, and if the connection is established, account authentication will be done. The result will be displayed in the user message.


* Storage **Google Drive**.


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Cloud_Storage.Settings_3.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) This field specifies the user name. For **Google Drive** it is an e-mail of Gmail email client.

![](../../images/img_2.png) This field specifies the password to the user account.

![](../../images/img_3.png) The button **Test Connection**. When pressed, the report server checks the internet connection, and if the connection is established, account authentication will be done. The result will be displayed in the user message.


* Storage **MS SharePoint**.


![](../../images/topics/Tab_Create.Cloud_Storage.Settings_4.png)


![](../../images/img_1.png) The address of the SharePoint server is specified in this field.

![](../../images/img_2.png) The domain name is specified in this field.

![](../../images/img_3.png) This field contains the name of the user account.

![](../../images/img_4.png) This field specifies the password to the user account.

![](../../images/img_5.png) The button **Test Connection**. When pressed, the report server checks the internet connection, and if the connection is established, account authentication will be done. The result will be displayed in the user message.

---

# Context Menu of Navigator

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Context_Menu_of_Navigator/index.md

The main commands of the report server are duplicated in the context menu. This menu will appear when you right-click a mouse (or holding your finger on mobile devices or other alternative action) in the toolbox. Below is the context menu:


![](../images/topics/Context_Menu_of_Navigator_1.png)


As can be seen from the picture above, the top part of the menu is represented with the commands to create basic items:

![](../images/img_1.png) The command invokes a menu to create a report or upload it from the file.

![](../images/img_2.png) The command adds a new data source.

![](../images/img_3.png) The command is use to schedule commands to be executed.

![](../images/img_4.png) The commands creates folders in the list of items. They are needed to organize and store items and other folders. Using to create a hierarchy of folders in the list of items of the report server.


Commands to create items are placed in a separate section:

![](../images/img_5.png) The command is used to invoke the **Calendar**. In the calendar, for example, you can create a schedule to run the scheduler.

![](../images/img_6.png) The command is used to add a file to the list of items in the report server.

![](../images/img_7.png) The command is used to call the menu to create a list of contacts. For example, the contact list may be used by the scheduler to send the result by email.


![](../images/img_8.png) The command is present only in the context menu of an item Report. This command runs a report for rendering and opens the tab view reports.

![](../images/img_9.png) This command calls the edit menu of the selected item.

![](../images/img_10.png) The command deletes selected item.

![](../images/img_11.png) The command is used to call the report designer and is present only in the context menu of an item Report.

![](../images/img_12.png) The command is used to cut items to the clipboard.

![](../images/img_13.png) The command is used to copy items to the clipboard.

![](../images/img_14.png) The command is used to paste items from the clipboard.


Also you should consider that in the context menu of the **Scheduler** the commands to control the scheduler will be present instead of the command Run Report:


![](../images/topics/Context_Menu_of_Navigator_2.png)


![](../images/img_1.png) This command starts the scheduler at once not by a schedule.

![](../images/img_2.png) Using this command the scheduler is running and it is executed according to the schedule.

![](../images/img_3.png) Using this command the scheduler stops.

---

# Menu Actions

Source: https://stimulsoft.github.io/Stimulsoft.Server.Manual/Context_Menu_of_Navigator/Menu_Actions.md

The menu **Actions** contains commands used for possible actions with the selected item. Depending on the type of an item, the number of steps may vary. Consider the example of the menu **Actions** of the item **Report**, because you can perform the greatest number of actions with this item. Below is the menu.


![](../images/topics/Context_Menu_of_Navigator.Menu_Actions_1.png)


![](../images/img_1.png) The command **Run** is used to render reports and load it to the viewer.

![](../images/img_2.png) Using this command the report is loaded to the report designer.

![](../images/img_3.png) Using this command calls the menu for the selected item of the selected version.

![](../images/img_4.png) Using this command calls the History menu for the selected item.

![](../images/img_5.png) Using this command the dialog box for selecting a report and then upload it to the item Report is called.

![](../images/img_6.png) Using this command the dialog box to save the selected report to a file is called.

![](../images/img_7.png) Using this command you can make the item available for certain persons

![](../images/img_8.png) Using this command an automatically generated unique key item is created. The unique key item is required for future access to this item when using the API of the report server by third party applications. After selecting this command, the key will be displayed on the panel Access Key.


The menu **Actions** for all elements of the type Scheduler will contain other commands. The picture below shows such a menu for the Scheduler.


![](../images/topics/Context_Menu_of_Navigator.Menu_Actions_2.png)


![](../images/img_1.png) This command runs the scheduler. The scheduler will be executed one time not by a schedule.

![](../images/img_2.png) With this command, the Scheduler is running according to the schedule.

![](../images/img_3.png) The commands stops the Scheduler.

![](../images/img_8.png) Using this command an automatically generated unique key item is created. The unique key item is required for future access to this item when using the API of the report server by third party applications. After selecting this command, the key will be displayed on the panel Access Key.
